articles.author: Dan Goodin
articles.title: New Rowhammer attacks give complete control of machines running Nvidia GPUs - Ars Technica
articles.description: Both GDDRHammer and GeForge hammer GPU memory in ways that compromise the CPU.

articles.author: Ryan Whitwam
articles.title: Google announces Gemma 4 open AI models, switches to Apache 2.0 license - Ars Technica
articles.description: Gemma 4 brings the first major update to Google's open models in a year.
